1506700093.english: [c][00FF00][To everyone, I might seem like a perfect superman, but I suppose I am just an ordinary human after all.][-][/c]
1506700093.korean: [c][00FF00][모두에게는 내가 완벽한 초인으로 보일지는 모르겠지만, 나도 결국은 평범한 인간이라는 거겠지.][-][/c]

1506700094.english: [c][00FF00][A human who simply strives and works hard for everyone.][-][/c]

1506700096.english: 2 minutes before the start of the operation.

1506700097.english: [c][00FF00][But you know what? I think things have changed a little now.][-][/c]

1506700098.english: [c][00FF00][Having spent a long time with everyone...][-][/c]

1506700099.english: [c][00FF00][Receiving a lot of help from everyone...][-][/c]

1506700101.english: [c][00FF00][As everyone's body and mind become one...][-][/c]

1506700102.english: [c][00FF00][I realized that my existence was made possible and completed because everyone was there.][-][/c]
1506700102.korean: [c][00FF00][모두가 있었기에 나라는 존재가 이루어졌고, 완성되었다는 걸 알게 됐어.][-][/c]

1506700103.english: 1 minute before the start of the operation.

1506700104.english: [c][00FF00][So there is no need to say it now.][-][/c]

1506700107.english: [c][00FF00][That this is the best choice to strengthen my heart...][-][/c]
1506700107.korean: [c][00FF00][이게 내 마음을 강하게 하기 위한 최선의 선택이라는 걸...][-][/c]

1506700108.english: [c][00FF00][I am more certain of myself than anyone.][-][/c]

1506700109.english: [c][00FF00][I am an ordinary human striving for everyone and...][-][/c]

1506700110.english: [c][00FF00][Because I am the strongest human who loves everyone!][-][/c]

1506700111.english: Leprechaun Squad Leader? Did you hear that? It seems you don't realize the Commander's microphone is on. Shouldn't we go tell her?
1506700111.korean: 레프리콘 분대장님? 들으셨슴까? 사령관님 마이크 켜져 있다는 걸 모르시는 거 같지 말임다?&n가서 말씀드려야 하지 않겠슴까?

1506700113.english: Haha, I heard you weren't good at giving speeches... That was truly an excellent speech, Your Excellency.
1506700113.korean: 후후, 연설을 못 하신다더니…&n참으로 훌륭한 연설이었습니다. 각하.

1506700114.english: It's obviously Armand's doing... I wonder what she's doing... Still, thanks to her, I heard something good.
1506700114.korean: 보나 마나 아르망의 짓이네… 뭐 하는 건지…&n그래도, 덕분에 좋은 걸 들었네.

1506700115.english: Sia, Sia, trust the former commander! So the former commander trusts Sia too, right?
1506700115.korean: 시아도 시아도 전대장님을 믿어! 전대장님도 시아를 믿고 있다는 거지?

1506700116.english: Yeah, of course. I believe in you, too.

1506700117.english: Hahaha, as expected of an Admiral! Then I have no choice but to live up to those expectations!
1506700117.korean: 하하하, 역시 제독이다! 그렇다면 그 기대에 부응하지 않을 수 없지!

1506700118.english: Wow, that's amazing... I don't think there's another speech that boosts morale this much.
1506700118.korean: 와~ 대박… 이 정도로 사기를 높여주는 연설은 또 없다고 생각해요.

1506700119.english: Seriously… you say such embarrassing things as if it’s nothing…
1506700119.korean: 정말… 부끄러운 소리를 아무렇지도 않게 한다니까…

1506700120.english: Neri! With the Commander's encouragement, I feel like I can do anything!
1506700120.korean: 네리! 사령관의 응원으로 뭐든지 할 수 있을 것 같아!

1506700121.english: Yes, let's do our best not to disappoint the Commander!
1506700121.korean: 네, 사령관님을 실망하게 하지 않도록 최선을 다하도록 해요!

1506700122.english: When you hear things like that, you have no choice but to work hard, even if you don't like it...
1506700122.korean: 저런 소리를 들으면 싫어도 열심히 할 수밖에 없잖아…

1506700123.english: Hmph, realizing that only now is way too late.
1506700123.korean: 흥, 그걸 이제야 깨닫다니 너무 늦잖아.

1506700124.english: Well… isn’t that typical of you, Commander?

1506700125.english: Hmm, from what I've seen, it doesn't seem like anything has changed from the past.
1506700125.korean: 음, 내가 봤을 때는 옛날이랑 달라진 게 없는 거 같은데?

1506700126.english: Hahaha, it’s true that the closer you are, the harder it is to notice changes. Really… you’re so commendable, so commendable.
1506700126.korean: 으하하하, 원래 가까울수록 변화를 눈치채기 힘든 법이지.&n정말… 기특하군, 기특해.

1506700127.english: "Body and mind becoming one," is that it… Hmm! That’s certainly true! Don’t you think so too?
1506700127.korean: 몸과 마음이 하나가 되어' 인가…&n음! 확실히 그 말대로지! 자네도 그렇게 생각하지 않나?

1506700128.english: Hmm... I guess I can't deny it...

1506700129.english: Hehe, I can feel everyone's morale rising. I should thank Armand.
1506700129.korean: 후후, 모두의 사기가 높아진 게 느껴져요.&n아르망에게는 감사해야겠어요.

1506700130.english: Honestly, I was a bit anxious too, but now I feel like I can do anything.
1506700130.korean: 솔직히 저도 좀 불안했는데, 지금이라면 뭐든지 할 수 있을 것 같은 기분이에요.

1506700131.english: Isn't that the Lord's true strength and ability?
1506700131.korean: 그게 주군의 진정한 힘이자 능력이 아니겠소?

1506700132.english: No one here right now would doubt their lord.
1506700132.korean: 지금 여기에 있는 그 누구도 주군을 의심하는 사람은 없을 것이오.

1506700133.english: - Hmm... I think I accidentally said something embarrassing.
1506700133.korean: - 으음… 얼떨결에 부끄러운 소리를 해버린 것 같다.

1506700134.english: Hahaha, it won't be a big deal.

1506700135.english: Now, Your Majesty. Then, give orders to everyone... Everyone is waiting only for Your Majesty's command.
1506700135.korean: 자, 폐하. 그럼 모두에게 명령을…&n모두가 폐하의 지휘만을 기다리고 있습니다.

1506700136.english: - This is not the end of our fight. There is still a long way to go, and many more battles await.
1506700136.korean: - 이 싸움의 우리의 마지막은 아니다.&n앞으로도 갈 길은 멀고 많은 싸움이 기다리고 있겠지.

1506700137.english: - If you cannot avoid it, just face it head-on.
1506700137.korean: - 피할 수 없다면, 당당하게 맞설 뿐이다.

1506700139.english: For this operation, I'm going to join the suppression team and go inside myself.
1506700139.korean: 이번 작전에는 나도 제압조에 들어가 직접 내부로 진입할 거야.

1506700140.english: As everyone knows, this operation absolutely cannot fail.
1506700140.korean: 모두가 알다시피 이번 작전은 절대 실패해서는 안 되는 작전이야.

1506700141.english: There is no guarantee that the same thing won't happen again, just like on the Northern Front.
1506700141.korean: 북부 전선 때처럼 똑같은 일이 일어나지 않으리란 보장은 없어.

1506700142.english: And since there is no communication right now, I need to take command directly on the ground.
1506700142.korean: 그리고 통신이 안 되는 지금, 내가 직접 현장에서 지휘할 필요가 있어.

1506700143.english: I know very well that everyone is worried about me.
1506700143.korean: 모두가 나를 걱정하는 건 잘 알고 있어.

1506700144.english: But that is precisely why I can't just sit still.
1506700144.korean: 하지만 그렇기 때문에 더욱더 가만히 있을 수 없어.

1506700146.english: Leave it to me, I will definitely make this operation a success.
1506700146.korean: 맡겨줘, 반드시 이 작전을 성공시킬 테니까.

1506700148.english: Hmm, it's not that I haven't thought about it...
1506700148.korean: 음, 생각을 안 해본 건 아닌데…

1506700149.english: Honestly, I don't have the confidence to give a great speech like Marie's.
1506700149.korean: 솔직히 마리처럼 멋진 연설을 할 자신이 없거든.

1506700150.english: You're really well-prepared... Did you predict that too?
1506700150.korean: 정말 준비성이 좋구나… 그것도 예측한 거야?

1506700151.english: Thank you, Armand. But it's okay.

1506700152.english: Yeah, thank you for preparing this for me. I'm sure it will be effective.
1506700152.korean: 응, 날 위해 준비해 준 건 고마워. 분명 효과도 있을 거라 생각해.

1506700153.english: Hmm, it seems a bit noisy around here. Is something wrong?
1506700153.korean: 음, 주변이 뭔가 소란스러운 것 같은데 무슨 일이라도 있나?

1506800001.english: A point 41 km away from the iron workshop.

1506800002.english: Operation Recapture Team for the Iron Workshop Attack

1506800004.english: I never thought I'd end up using this route again.
1506800004.korean: 설마 이 루트를 또 사용하게 될 줄이야.

1506800005.english: She changed from a drone to a Pupp Head, but she still can't swim, you know...
1506800005.korean: 드론에서 펍 헤드로 모습이 바뀌었지만, 수영을 못하는 건 여전하고 말이지…

1506800006.english: Ugh... I'm scared of water... I'm scared of water... You're the weird one, Shepherd, for acting like nothing's wrong in the water...
1506800006.korean: 으으… 물은 무서워… 물은 무서워…&n물속에서 아무렇지도 않은 셰퍼드 네가 이상한 거야…

1506800013.english: What are you doing! It hurts!

1506800014.english: What do you mean by that? I performed CPR.
1506800014.korean: 뭐 하는 짓이긴 심폐소생술 한 거지.

1506800017.english: Ugh... it's cold... How can a guy called the leader not even be able to swim?
1506800017.korean: 으… 추워… 무슨 대장이라는 얘가 수영도 못하는 건데?

1506800018.english: I'm ashamed... I don't float... because I'm too heavy...
1506800018.korean: 면목 없다… 나는 물에 안 뜬다… 무거워서…

1506800019.english: That's funny. How heavy could something so tiny be... No, actually, it is heavy...
1506800019.korean: 웃기네, 쪼그만 한 게 무거워봤자 얼마나 무겁… 아니 무겁긴 하지…

1506800021.english: Look, the majority of people can't swim like me... It's absolutely not strange...
1506800021.korean: 봐봐, 나처럼 수영 못하는 사람이 태반이잖아...&n이상한 게 절대 아니야…

1506800022.english: I'm speechless... Why are there so many kids in Orca who can't swim? Should I suggest to the Commander that they open regular swimming classes?
1506800022.korean: 할 말이 없네… 오르카에 수영을 못하는 애들이 왜 이렇게 많은 거야?&n정기 수영 교실이라도 열어 달라고 사령관한테 건의해야 하나.

1506800023.english: So, where is this place? I heard it's a secret passage that allows you to infiltrate the Iron... anyway, enemy base.
1506800023.korean: 그래서, 여기는 어디야?&n철의... 어쨌든 적이 있는 본거지에 잠입할 수 있는 비밀 통로라고 들었는데.

1506800024.english: It's a passageway connected to the basement of Zeta's factory. We'll reach the factory in just 41km.
1506800024.korean: 제타의 공장 지하와 연결된 통로야.&n앞으로 41km만 더 가면 공장에 도착할 거야.

1506800025.english: Wait, wait! 41km!? We still have a long way to go! Why are we starting from such a far place?
1506800025.korean: 잠깐, 잠깐! 41km!? 한참 가야 하잖아! 왜 이렇게 멀리 떨어진 곳에서 출발하는 건데?

1506800026.english: I understand... because I had the same reaction.

1506800027.english: Haa... Why am I going through all this trouble...

1506800028.english: This is a task personally ordered by Master. It is an important mission to secretly infiltrate the enemy base and recapture the key target.
1506800028.korean: 주인님이 직접 지시한 일이다.&n적의 기지에 몰래 잠입하여 주요 대상을 탈환하는 중요한 임무다.

1506800029.english: I heard that there is an enemy that stops the movement of bioroids.
1506800029.korean: 듣기로는 바이오로이드의 움직임을 멈추는 적이 있다고 한다.

1506800030.english: Since it is said that this does not work on bioroids with the right to insubordination, it is certain that we are the right people for this job.
1506800030.korean: 항명권을 가진 바이오로이드는 그게 통하지 않는다고 하니, 우리가 이 일의 적임인 건 확실하다.

1506800031.english: Hehe, I'm not entirely sure, but! I'll make sure to finish this job perfectly!
1506800031.korean: 후후, 잘은 모르겠지만! 이번 일은 완벽하게 끝내 보이겠어!

1506800032.english: What's up, Babonir? You're strangely overflowing with enthusiasm.

1506800033.english: Of course I'm full of motivation! The commander promised to give me a reward once this mission is over, didn't he?
1506800033.korean: 당연히 의욕이 넘치지! 사령관이 이 임무가 끝나면 보상을 주기로 했잖아?

1506800034.english: It's obvious what you're going to ask for...
1506800034.korean: 네가 뭘 요구할지 안 봐도 뻔하네…

1506800035.english: Whatever it is, being full of enthusiasm is a good thing.
1506800035.korean: 뭐가 됐든 의욕이 넘치면 좋은 일이지.

1506800036.english: Okay, now we have to get past this point... Is there anyone among you who is good at games?
1506800036.korean: 자, 이제 여기를 또 넘어가야 하는데…&n혹시 너희들 중에 게임 잘하는 사람 있어?

1506800037.english: Why the sudden game? I'm not entirely sure, but I'm pretty confident.
1506800037.korean: 갑자기 웬 게임?&n잘은 모르겠지만, 내가 좀 자신 있지.

1506800038.english: You mean Steel Line Fighter VI Master?

1506800041.english: Huh? What do you mean by that?

1506800042.english: Roll, roll, rest for 1 second, roll, roll, rest for 2 seconds, roll, roll, roll, rest for 1 second, roll, roll, rest for 1 second, back roll, roll, roll, roll, rest for 1 second, roll, roll, roll, back roll, roll… .......
1506800042.korean: 구르기 구르기 1초 쉬고 구르기 구르기 2초 쉬고 구르기 구르기 구르기 1초 쉬고 구르기 구르기&n1초 쉬고 뒷 구르기 구르기 구르기 구르기 1초 쉬고 구르기 구르기 구르기 뒷 구르기 구르기….......

1506800043.english: Your Majesty! Confirmed energy cutoff at four external factories!
1506800043.korean: 폐하! 외부 공장 네 곳에서의 에너지 차단을 확인!

1506800044.english: The barrier surrounding the iron workshop is starting to disappear!
1506800044.korean: 철의 공방을 감싼 방벽이 사라지기 시작합니다!

1506800045.english: - The fact that the barrier has opened means that the blocking team succeeded in the operation.
1506800045.korean: - 방벽이 열렸다는 건 차단조들이 작전에 성공했다는 뜻이다.

1506800046.english: - I would love to assess the extent of the damage and the condition of the team members, but... I don't have the luxury to do so right now.
1506800046.korean: - 피해 상황이라던가 대원들의 상태를 파악하고 싶은 마음은 굴뚝같지만… 지금은 그럴 여유가 없다.

1506800047.english: - The first phase of the operation to attack the Iron Workshop has been completed.
1506800047.korean: - 철의 공방 공략 작전의 첫 번째 단계가 완료되었다.

1506800048.english: - By now, the recapture team would have started moving as well.

1506800051.english: Just give me the order. I will absolutely not allow anyone to approach you, Master.
1506800051.korean: 명령만 해주세요.&n주인님에게는 절대 접근하지 못하게 하겠습니다.

1506800052.english: Yes, since it is Zeta's base, you never know what might happen inside.
1506800052.korean: 네, 제타의 본거지인 만큼 안에서 무슨 일이 벌어질지 모르니까요.

1506800053.english: I will accompany you as well, as Kestos Himas's computational power might be needed.
1506800053.korean: 케스토스 히마스의 연산 능력이 필요할 수도 있으니 저도 같이 동행하겠습니다.

1506800054.english: My lord, I pray for your good fortune. I am sorry that I cannot accompany you…
1506800054.korean: 주군, 무운을 빌겠소.&n같이 동행하지 못하여 죄송하오…

1506800055.english: Understood. Leave the outside matters to the officer.

1506800057.english: - There is no turning back now. We can only move forward.
1506800057.korean: - 이제 뒤로 물러설 수 없다. 오직 앞으로 나아갈 뿐.

1506800058.english: - The second phase of the operation to attack the Iron Workshop has begun.
1506800058.korean: - 철의 공방 공략 작전의 두 번째 단계가 시작되었다.

1506800059.english: Mother, the enemies have breached the barrier and entered the factory.
1506800059.korean: 어머니, 적들이 방벽을 돌파하여 공장 내부로 진입하였습니다.

1506800062.english: It took a considerable amount of time due to the 'AI inside,' but it has been almost completely subdued.
1506800062.korean: 안에 들어있는 AI' 때문에 상당한 시간이 걸렸습니다만, 거의 제압이 완료되었습니다.

1506800063.english: You gave me quite a hard time, Epsilon.

1506800064.english: never imagined they would put something like that in the Kestos Himas.
1506800064.korean: 설마 케스토스 히마스에 그런 걸 넣어놨을 줄이야.

1506800065.english: Hestia, I will leave the rest to you.

1506800066.english: As soon as you subdue that 'little guy', use Epsilon's Kestos Himas.
1506800066.korean: 그 '조그만 녀석'을 제압하는 대로 엡실론의 케스토스 히마스를 사용하세요.

1506800069.english: It’s just a little bit now. With just a little more time, we can create the world that He wants.
1506800069.korean: 이제 조금이에요.&n앞으로 조금이면 그분이 원하시는 세상을 만들 수 있어요.

1506800070.english: How dare… those bastards interfere with that…

1506800072.english: You think so too, don't you?

1506800074.english: To be continued in Part 5 of <The Iron Workshop>…

1506800075.english: Enemies are going to swarm in to block our entry!
1506800075.korean: 우리의 진입을 막기 위해 적들이 몰려올 거야!

1506800076.english: Stop the swarming enemy with reserve troops!

1506800079.english: And… are you really going to go together?

1506800081.english: Because someone has to stay behind and take command of this place.
1506800081.korean: 누군가는 남아서 이곳의 지휘를 맡아야 하니까.

1506800082.english: I think Dragon is the most suitable person. I'm entrusting the team members to you.
1506800082.korean: 용이 제일 적임이라고 생각해. 대원들을 부탁할게.

1506800083.english: Yes, I will definitely come back with everyone.

1506800084.english: Deliver to the suppression team! We are starting the entry now!
1506800084.korean: 제압조 대원들에게 전달! 지금부터 진입을 시작한다!

1506900003.english: Yes, thank you for your hard work. But I can't see Thetis. Where is she?
1506900003.korean: 네, 고생하셨어요. 그런데 테티스의 모습이 보이지 않는데 어디에 있죠?

1506900004.english: Huh? It was definitely there before the operation started... No way, not again...!
1506900004.korean: 어? 분명 작전 시작 전에는 있었는데… 설마 또…!

1506900005.english: Here I am! I was just back from a quick scouting mission! Even I wouldn't disappear at such a critical moment!
1506900005.korean: 여기 있어! 잠깐 정찰하고 왔을 뿐이야!&n아무리 나라도 이런 중요한 순간에 없어지거나 하지 않는 다고!

1506900006.english: Haha, of course. I trust Thetis, after all. So, how about scouting?
1506900006.korean: 후후, 그럼요. 테티스를 믿고 있는 걸요.&n그래서 정찰은 어떤가요?

1506900007.english: First of all, there are an enormous number of them. There was also the appearance of the connector that ejects the machine, which was mentioned in the operation meeting.
1506900007.korean: 일단 수가 엄청나게 많아요.&n작전 회의에서 나왔던 기계를 사출하는 연결체의 모습도 있었어요.

1506900008.english: I wonder if we can break through that large number on our own...
1506900008.korean: 저희들 만으로 저 많은 수를 돌파할 수 있을지…

1506900009.english: Hahaha! You don't necessarily have to break through!

1506900010.english: If the enemy is outnumbered, can't we just push through with even greater firepower?
1506900010.korean: 적의 수가 많다면 그 이상의 화력으로 밀어붙이면 되지 않느냐!

1506900011.english: Melite is right. Our goal is to destroy the factory and cut off the energy being produced.
1506900011.korean: 멜리테의 말이 맞아요.&n저희의 목표는 공장을 파괴하여 생산되는 에너지를 차단하는 거니까요.

1506900012.english: Leave it to Sia! Sia will give all those naughty kids a good scolding with a loud bang!
1506900012.korean: 시아에게 맡겨줘!&n기분 나쁜 애들은 전부 쾅! 하고 시아가 혼쭐을 내줄게!

1506900013.english: Leave the approaching guys to me! I'll stop them from getting close to everyone!
1506900013.korean: 다가오는 놈들은 나에게 맡겨줘! 모두에게 접근할 수 없도록 내가 막을 테니까!

1506900016.english: It is time to show those Iron Bugs the power of the Mermaid Fleet once again!
1506900016.korean: 철충 녀석들에게 머메이드 함대의 힘을 다시 보여줄 때다!

1506900018.english: The goal is an energy production plant!

1506900020.english: Hahaha, are you just going to stand there?

1506900021.english: Haha, no way. It actually feels like I've been punched.
1506900021.korean: 후후, 그럴 리가요.&n오히려 한 대 맞은 느낌인걸요.

1506900022.english: We at Horizon can't lose either, right?

1506900023.english: Undine, Nereid, Thetis. Then, I will begin.

1506900024.english: Horizon! Operation begins now! Entire fleet, prepare for bombardment!
1506900024.korean: 호라이즌! 지금부터 작전을 시작합니다! 전 함대 포격 준비!

1506900025.english: The goal is the same: an energy production plant!

1507000002.english: Commander, this is a sign that the Iron Bug are being driven toward the East Gate!
1507000002.korean: 대장님, 철충의 움직임이 동쪽 문으로 몰리고 있는 신호입니다!

1507000003.english: What is the situation like in each unit?

1507000004.english: It is said that the 1st and 2nd Platoons have just arrived at the objective and are about to begin combat. However, there are reportedly fewer enemies nearby than expected.
1507000004.korean: 1소대와 2소대는 지금 막 목표 지점에 도착하여 전투를 시작한다고 합니다.&n하지만, 주변의 적이 생각보다 없다고 합니다.

1507000005.english: Two minutes ago, a signal came that the 3rd and 4th platoons were attempting to breach the south gate.
1507000005.korean: 3소대와 4소대는 2분 전 남쪽 문 돌파를 시도한다는 신호가 왔습니다.

1507000006.english: Then, 2nd Platoon, signal to support the east where 5th Platoon is located.
1507000006.korean: 그럼 2소대는 5소대가 있는 동쪽을 지원하도록 신호를 보내라.

1507000007.english: The 3rd and 4th Platoons break through the south gate and approach the factory!
1507000007.korean: 3소대와 4소대는 그대로 남쪽 문을 돌파 공장 쪽으로 접근한다!

1507000008.english: The remaining units stand by at their current positions, preparing for any unforeseen circumstances!
1507000008.korean: 남은 부대는 현재 위치에서 대기, 혹시 모를 상황에 대비한다!

1507000009.english: Yes! I will convey it that way.

1507000010.english: But Morse code... I have the knowledge, but this is the first time I'm using it.
1507000010.korean: 그런데 모스 부호라니… 지식은 있지만, 사용해 보는 건 이번이 처음입니다.

1507000011.english: Commander, have you ever used it?

1507000012.english: There have been a few times.

1507000013.english: However, this is my first time using it against Iron Bug.
1507000013.korean: 하지만 철충을 상대로 사용하는 건 나도 처음이다.

1507000014.english: New signal received… News that we have safely breached the South Gate!
1507000014.korean: 새로운 신호를 수신… 무사히 남쪽 문을 돌파했다는 소식입니다!

1507000015.english: Alright! It starts now! Steel Line Unit advances!
1507000015.korean: 좋아! 이제부터가 시작이다! 스틸 라인 부대 전진한다!

1507000016.english: It looks like the Steel Line unit has breached the gate.
1507000016.korean: 스틸 라인 부대가 문을 돌파한 것 같습니다.

1507000018.english: You might not be able to hear everything clearly, but the more that happens, the more you should focus on my command frame.
1507000018.korean: 모두 잘 안 들릴 수도 있겠지만, 그럴수록 더욱 내 커맨드 프레임에 집중해.

1507000019.english: I, too, will send the signal to everyone at maximum output without holding back.
1507000019.korean: 나 역시 아끼지 않고 최대 출력으로 모두에게 신호를 보낼 테니까.

1507000020.english: As you can see, our battlefield is an urban area densely packed with industrial zones.
1507000020.korean: 보다시피 우리들의 전장은 공업 지대가 밀집되어 있는 시가지야.

1507000021.english: It's a fight in the field we do best.

1507000022.english: Make sure to show it to them.

1507000023.english: What kind of unit the Sisters of Valhalla are!

1507100001.english: The enemy has high-speed disruption links. Therefore, our battle will be a crucial one in this operation to secure air superiority.
1507100001.korean: 적은 고속 교란용 연결체.&n따라서 우리의 전투는 이 작전에서 제공권을 잡는 중요한 전투가 될 거야.

1507100006.english: If you want to become cute, Linti, eat more too.

1507100007.english: Even for cute Linti, this much might be too much...
1507100007.korean: 아무리 귀여운 린티라도 이렇게 많이는 무리일지도…

1507100008.english: You brought the black hound, the one you usually like.
1507100008.korean: 블랙 하운드도, 평소에 좋아하는 걸로 가져왔네.

1507100009.english: Wow! I was just thinking of that. Thanks for the meal!
1507100009.korean: 와! 안 그래도 생각났는데 잘 먹겠습니다!

1507100010.english: Here is a warm drink; drinking it will help you relax.
1507100010.korean: 여기 따뜻한 음료일세, 마시면 긴장이 풀릴 게야.

1507100011.english: Thank you. I feel a little more at ease now.

1507100012.english: This is all I can do for you right now, but I will hug you again when the battle is over. I mean all of it, of course.
1507100012.korean: 지금은 이것밖에 못 해주지만, 전투가 끝나면 또 안아주겠네.&n물론 전부 다 말일세.

1507100013.english: Yes~! I'll work hard so I can get a hug!
1507100013.korean: 네~! 포옹 받을 수 있도록 열심히 할게요!

1507100016.english: Oh my, oh my, you're such an impatient child.

1507100018.english: You two eat too. I told you to eat so much, but if you're still in that physique, do you think you'll have the strength to fight!
1507100018.korean: 두 사람도 먹게나.&n내가 그렇게 많이 먹으라고 했는데 아직도 그 체형이면 싸울 때 힘이 나겠나!

1507100019.english: I'm fine. Just take good care of the adjutant.

1507100020.english: What is this? It sounds like you're saying you've grown enough and aren't needed anymore.
1507100020.korean: 뭐죠? 마치 자기는 성장할 만큼 성장했으니 필요 없다는 뜻으로 들리는데요?

1507100021.english: Oh my? Aren't you being too self-conscious? I was talking about 'body shape,' you know?
1507100021.korean: 어머? 자의식 과잉이 아닐까? 내가 말한 건 '체형' 쪽의 얘기인데?

1507100022.english: Haha, I’m also talking about body shape, of course.

1507100023.english: Hmm, it looks like something started without me realizing it.
1507100023.korean: 음, 모르는 사이 뭔가가 시작된 모양이구만.

1507100024.english: I'm not entirely sure, but both of you, please be careful. If it gets dangerous, don't push yourself too hard and make sure to leave.
1507100024.korean: 잘은 모르겠지만, 두 사람 다 조심하게나.&n위험하면 무리하지 말고 꼭 이탈하게.

1507100025.english: Now you're not even saying you'll accomplish the mission even if it means sacrificing your life?
1507100025.korean: 이제는 목숨을 바쳐서라도 임무를 달성하겠다고 하지 않네?

1507100026.english: If you have come to Orca, follow Orca's rules.

1507100027.english: Weren't you the one who told me that?

1507100028.english: Hehe, I’ve come to think this method isn’t bad either.
1507100028.korean: 후후, 이 방식도 나쁘지 않다고 생각하게 됐네.

1507100029.english: However, I will not sacrifice my life, but I intend to accomplish the mission without fail.
1507100029.korean: 허나 목숨을 바치지 않지만, 임무는 반드시 달성할 생각이네.

1507100031.english: Hahaha, our commander is so greedy that it looks like he picked it up from me.
1507100031.korean: 하하하, 우리 사령관이 하도 욕심쟁이다 보니 나에게 옮은 모양이네.

1507100032.english: Isn't it better to just let things be?

1507100035.english: Let's all return safely this time too!

1507200001.english: Th-a hit again...! That's amazing! My hit rate is 100% so far!

1507200002.english: Hahaha! Of course! Once I set my sights on prey, I never let it slip away!
1507200002.korean: 하하하하! 당연하다! 한번 정한 사냥감은 절대 놓치지 않지!

1507200003.english: I am 100% confident that I can hit even the Commander with a single shot!
1507200003.korean: 사령관에게도 100% 한 방에 명중시킬 자신이 있다!

1507200005.english: That’s enough… What on earth are you talking about in front of an innocent child who knows nothing?
1507200005.korean: 거기까지… 아무것도 모르는 순수한 아이 앞에서 대체 무슨 소리를 하는 건가요.

1507200006.english: And why is the captain shooting... no, let's stop there.
1507200006.korean: 그리고 왜 대장이 쏘는 쪽… 아니, 여기까지 하죠.

1507200007.english: I'm sorry because of our Captain, Captain Khan.
1507200007.korean: 저희 대장님 때문에 죄송합니다 칸 대장님.

1507200008.english: It's okay. Our unit is very used to it.

1507200009.english: I also think that even though it is a battlefield, it is okay to lighten the tense atmosphere to some extent.
1507200009.korean: 나 역시 전장이라고는 하나 긴장된 분위기를 푸는 정도는 괜찮다고 생각한다.

1507200010.english: Ah, come to think of it, I forgot to ask you.
1507200010.korean: 아아, 그러고 보니 자네에게 물어보는 걸 잊었군.

1507200012.english: Hahahaha, I didn't miss it, Khan?

1507200013.english: When I spoke right after the commander gave that great speech… I said it was undeniable, didn't I?
1507200013.korean: 사령관이 멋진 연설 직후 내가 말했을 때… 분명 부정할 수 없다고 말했지?

1507200015.english: It looks like you had a good time with the commander recently, doesn't it?
1507200015.korean: 최근 사령관과 좋은 시간이 있었던 모양이지?

1507200017.english: Let's see... As far as I know, I'm pretty sure I trained with the Commander recently. Was that when?
1507200017.korean: 어디 보자… 내가 알기로 분명 최근 사령관과 둘이서 단련을 했던 것 같은데 그때인가?

1507200020.english: Oh! Talonfeather, you've come at just the right time! Hmm! Of course I called you! I was just calling for you!
1507200020.korean: 오! 탈론페더 마침 잘 왔어! 음! 불렀고 말고!&n딱 널 부른 참이지!

1507200023.english: Did you run away... Don't be shy... Hahaha, Khan has become cute too.

1507200024.english: Alright! Let's continue the detailed story after we're done!
1507200024.korean: 자아! 자세한 이야기는 끝난 뒤에 계속해 보자고!

1507200025.english: I couldn't possibly miss out on such an interesting story!
1507200025.korean: 이런 재미있는 이야기를 놓칠 수야 없지!

1507300002.english: I told you it was far. Good job finishing the 41km marathon. Now you have to go upstairs from the basement.
1507300002.korean: 그러니까 내가 멀다고 말했잖아. 41km 마라톤 완주 고생했어.&n이제 지하에서 위층으로 올라가야 해.

1507300003.english: I still have a long way to go…

1507300004.english: I'm too lazy to run on my own... If I'd known this would happen, I should have come in a drone's body...
1507300004.korean: 직접 달리기 귀찮아… 이럴 줄 알았으면 드론의 몸으로 올걸 그랬어…

1507300005.english: Even if you had come in the body of a drone, it wouldn't have flown like it did back then. I know this is coming up now, but actually, you could fly around just fine back then if you focused, right?
1507300005.korean: 드론의 몸으로 와도 그때처럼 날라주지 않았을 거야.&n이제 와서 하는 말이지만, 너 사실 그때도 집중하면 잘만 날아다닐 수 있던 거지?

1507300008.english: We successfully entered the iron workshop.
1507300008.korean: 철의 공방 내부로 무사히 진입에 성공했다.

1507300009.english: Judging by the fact that the barrier surrounding the outside has disappeared, it must mean the blocking team succeeded in the operation.
1507300009.korean: 외부를 감싸고 있던 방벽이 사라진 걸 봐서는 차단조가 작전에 성공했다는 거겠지.

1507300010.english: By now, Master must have entered the workshop as well.
1507300010.korean: 지금쯤이면 주인님도 공방 내부로 들어오셨을 거다.

1507300011.english: So what? What are we supposed to do from now on? Even if we talk about recapture, I don't really understand that kind of thing.
1507300011.korean: 그래서? 이제부터 우리는 뭘 어떻게 해야 하는데?&n탈환이라 해도 난 그런 거 잘 모르겠거든.

1507300012.english: I'm confident when it comes to sabotage, though.

1507300013.english: I'm actually more confident in assassination than in rescuing key figures~
1507300013.korean: 나도 요인 구출보다는 암살이 더 자신 있는데~

1507300014.english: … Our mission is to find and reclaim the captured Lemonade Epsilon’s body.
1507300014.korean: …우리의 임무는 붙잡혀 있는 레모네이드 엡실론의 몸을 찾아 탈환하는 거다.

1507300015.english: It is neither sabotage nor assassination.

1507300016.english: She’s the one with the deadliest special skill among us, yet she’s so smooth with her words.&nOr, Bargh, have you ever even been on a rescue mission?
1507300016.korean: 자기가 우리 중에서 가장 살벌한 주특기를 가졌으면서 말은 잘해요.&n아니면 바르그 넌 뭐 언제 구출 임무라도 해본 적 있어?

1507300018.english: That does not change what we have to do.
1507300018.korean: 그렇다고 해서 우리가 해야 할 일이 달라지지는 않는다.

1507300020.english: I've heard about it, but everyone is so unique.

1507300021.english: I am ashamed. It is entirely my fault for being inadequate as the leader.
1507300021.korean: 면목 없다.&n전부 대장인 내가 부족한 탓이다.

1507300022.english: No, actually, that makes her seem trustworthy.

1507300023.english: It is an extremely dangerous mission to infiltrate secretly and reclaim a target whose location is unknown.
1507300023.korean: 몰래 잠입해서 어디에 있는지도 모르는 대상을 탈환하는 위험하기 그지없는 임무인데.

1507300024.english: Far from being flustered, everyone is just going their own way, aren't they?

1507300025.english: I think it's a really cool unit.

1507300028.english: We are now commencing the mission of the recapture team for the Iron Workshop assault operation!
1507300028.korean: 지금부터 철의 공방 공략 작전 탈환조 임무를 개시한다!

1507300029.english: Tear them apart for your master!

1507300030.english: Hahaha~ So in the end, it's just the usual way of doing things, huh?
1507300030.korean: 하하하~ 결국은 늘 하던 대로라는 거네~?

1507300031.english: Okay, I'll just destroy everything, right?

1507300032.english: Let me tell you in advance, I'm absolutely not going to do it like I did back then this time!
1507300032.korean: 미리 말해두지만, 이번에는 절대로 그때처럼 안 할 거야!

1507300035.english: All the enemies on this side have been defeated. Lilith, how about over there?
1507300035.korean: 이쪽의 적은 전부 쓰러졌어요.&n리리스, 그쪽은 어떻죠?

1507300036.english: Wait a minute, I found a hiding rat.

1507300037.english: - Lilith approached the T-1 Goblin at a very fast speed.
1507300037.korean: - 리리스는 멀리 떨어져 있는 T-1 고블린에게 매우 빠른 속도로 다가갔다.

1507300038.english: - The infantry goblin fired to prevent her from approaching, and Lilith elegantly dodged all the bullets with minimal movement.
1507300038.korean: - 보병 고블린은 접근을 막기 위해 사격을 가했고, 리리스는 최소한의 움직임으로 우아하게 총알을 모두 피했다.

1507300039.english: - But then, an artillery goblin hiding behind the wall fired a cannon at the ground where Lilith was.
1507300039.korean: - 하지만 그때 벽 뒤에 숨어 있던 포병 고블린이 리리스가 있는 지면을 향해 포를 발사했다.

1507300040.english: - There was a loud explosion, debris, and smoke rising...
1507300040.korean: - 큰 폭발음과 파편 그리고 연기가 피어올랐고…

1507300042.english: First, the one that was hiding. To think it dared to stir up dust where its master is... I cannot forgive it.
1507300042.korean: 우선 숨어 있던 한 마리.&n주인님이 계신 곳에서 감히 흙먼지를 일으키다니… 용서할 수 없네요.

1507300043.english: - Lilith, having deployed Rosa Azule, was unharmed without a single scratch, and the remaining goblins also collapsed with the sound of gunshots.
1507300043.korean: - 로자 아쥴을 전개한 리리스는 긁힌 상처 하나 없이 멀쩡했고, 남은 고블린 역시 총소리와 함께 쓰러졌다.

1507300044.english: Master, the entrance has been cleaned up. I accidentally stirred up some dust while cleaning. I apologize.
1507300044.korean: 주인님, 입구 정리가 끝났습니다.&n정리하던 중 다소의 흙먼지를 일으키고 말았습니다. 죄송합니다.

1507300045.english: - First, we succeeded in entering the interior. The objective of the suppression team is to subdue Zeta, who caused this anomaly.
1507300045.korean: - 우선 내부에 진입하는 데 성공했다.&n제압조의 목표는 이번 이변을 일으킨 제타를 제압하는 것.

1507300046.english: - To do that, we first need to know where Zeta is...
1507300046.korean: - 그러기 위해서는 먼저 제타가 있는 위치를 알아야 하는데…

1507300047.english: Master, after analyzing the internal structure, it definitely matches the information Epsilon handed over. I think we should secure the control room first to find out where Zeta is.
1507300047.korean: 주인님, 내부 구조를 파악한 결과 확실히 엡실론이 넘겨준 정보와 일치하고 있어요.&n제타가 있는 위치를 알아내기 위해서는 가장 먼저 제어실을 제압하는 게 좋을 것 같아요.

1507300048.english: If you look at the blueprint, there is a room at the very back of the first floor that looks like a control room.
1507300048.korean: 설계도를 보면 1층 제일 안쪽에 제어실로 보이는 방이 있어요.

1507300049.english: Then I guess I should go that way first.

1507300050.english: - Has it already been 6 hours since the operation began?

1507300051.english: - According to Armand's prediction, the portal will open within the next 18 hours.
1507300051.korean: - 아르망의 예측으로는 앞으로 18시간 이내에 포탈이 열리게 될 거야.

1507300053.english: This is fine. Good job, Lilith.

1507300055.english: Let's hurry. We must stop Zeta.
1507300055.korean: 서두르자, 반드시 우리가 제타를 저지하는 거야.

1507400001.english: Locate and neutralize the enemies inside the building. We've been dealing with Iron Bugs all the time, so it's been a while since we've had a mission in our specialty.
1507400001.korean: 건물 내부에 있는 적을 찾아 제압한다.&n맨날 철충만 상대했는데 오랜만에 우리 특기 분야 임무네.

1507400002.english: Leave protecting the hostages to me! I'll protect everyone!
1507400002.korean: 인질을 지키는 건 나에게 맡겨줘! 모두 보호할 테니까!

1507400003.english: Unfortunately, there are no hostages or targets to protect on this mission.
1507400003.korean: 아쉽지만 이번 임무에는 인질도 보호할 대상도 없어.

1507400004.english: Is that so… Still, no problem! If there are no hostages, I just have to protect my comrades!
1507400004.korean: 그런가… 그래도 문제없다!&n인질이 없다면 동료들을 지킬 뿐이니까!

1507400005.english: Draco has nothing to worry about. She will be right in the middle of enemy territory.
1507400005.korean: 드라코는 걱정이 없구나.&n적진 한 가운데 있게 될 텐데.

1507400006.english: Why would she have anything to worry about?
1507400006.korean: 쟤가 걱정 같은 걸 할 일이 어디 있겠어?

1507400008.english: She is coordinating the operation with the commander.

1507400009.english: So, there is time left before departure?

1507400010.english: Don't you have a fun story?

1507400011.english: An interesting story... are you talking about that trashy drama you watched recently?
1507400011.korean: 재미있는 이야기라니… 얼마 전에 봤던 막장 드라마 얘기라던가?

1507400012.english: I know that too! We all watched it together in the room.
1507400012.korean: 그건 나도 알아! 방에서 다 같이 봤잖아.

1507400013.english: Miho, don't you have a funny story?

1507400016.english: This is something that happened to me not long ago.
1507400016.korean: 이건 내가 얼마 전에 겪은 일인데.

1507400017.english: I was sleeping in the middle of the night when, around two in the morning, I suddenly heard a knocking sound on the door.
1507400017.korean: 한밤중에 자고 있는데 새벽 두 시쯤, 갑자기 문을 두드리는 소리가 들리는 거야.

1507400018.english: Huh? Not a funny story, but a ghost story?

1507400019.english: I was scared, but I mustered up the courage to open the door...

1507400021.english: So I tried to go back to sleep, but...

1507400022.english: Just then, I heard the sound of knocking on the door again.
1507400022.korean: 그때 다시 한번 문을 두드리는 소리가 나는 거야.

1507400024.english: But as expected, there was no one.

1507400025.english: So I lay down to sleep again.

1507400026.korean: 그런데 그때… 나는 어떤 사실을 눈치챘어…

1507400028.english: Before I knew it, it was morning.

1507400029.english: Huh? What is that? Is that the end?

1507400034.english: Okay, that's all for the fun. Mom's here.

1507400035.english: Mongoose Team, we will now give the operation briefing.

1507400036.english: We must secure the computer room first before neutralizing Lemonade Zeta, the objective of this operation.
1507400036.korean: 이번 작전의 목표인 레모네이드 제타를 제압하기 전에 먼저 전산실을 확보해야 합니다.

1507400037.english: I assume everyone has checked the information regarding the building's internal structure, but the outermost room is the computer room.
1507400037.korean: 모두 건물 내부 구조의 정보를 확인했으리라 생각합니다만, 가장 바깥쪽에 있는 방이 전산실입니다.

1507400038.english: There are Iron-clad Goblins everywhere, so everyone, please do not let your guard down.
1507400038.korean: 곳곳에 철충화된 고블린들이 있으니 모두 경계를 늦추지 마세요.

1507400039.english: Draco, please take the lead and protect everyone.

1507400041.english: … Bulgasari, please clear a path for your teammates to enter. If there are any doors that do not open, destroying them is also permitted.
1507400041.korean: …불가사리는 팀원이 진입할 수 있도록 길을 열어주세요.&n열리지 않는 문이 있다면 파괴도 허가합니다.

1507400043.english: Miho asks you to eliminate the enemies from the rear. As you know, they are no longer bioroids. Do not hesitate.
1507400043.korean: 미호는 후방에서 적들의 제거를 부탁합니다.&n알고 있겠지만 저들은 더 이상 바이오로이드가 아닙니다. 망설이지 마세요.

1507400045.english: Finally, Pinto, please handle reconnaissance, securing vision, and disrupting the enemies.
1507400045.korean: 마지막으로 핀토는 정찰 및 시야 확보, 적들의 교란을 부탁합니다.

1507400047.english: Please don't overexert yourself. And don't get too far away from Draco.
1507400047.korean: 아무쪼록 무리하지 마세요.&n드라코와 너무 떨어지지 마시고요.

1507400049.english: Ah! That's unfair! You only petted Pinto! Mom, me too!
1507400049.korean: 아앗! 치사해! 핀토만 쓰다듬어 주고!&n엄마 저도요!

1507400050.english: I'll give you all a pat on the head once this operation is safely finished.
1507400050.korean: 이번 작전이 무사히 끝나면 모두 쓰다듬어 드릴게요.

1507400052.english: Then, Mongoose Team, we will begin the operation.

1507500001.english: - After successfully securing the control room thanks to the efforts of the Mongoose Team, they attempted to hack the computer network system to determine Zeta's location.
1507500001.korean: - 몽구스 팀의 활약으로 무사히 제어실을 확보한 후, 제타의 위치를 파악하기 위해 전산망 시스템 해킹을 시도했다.

1507500002.english: I expected it, but the defense is solid.

1507500003.english: Since it is a building designed by Zeta, it was likely designed with hacking defenses in mind from the start, but even so, the security is formidable.
1507500003.korean: 제타가 설계한 건물이니 처음부터 해킹 방어를 염두에 두고 설계했겠지만, 그렇다 하더라도 보안이 막강하네요.

1507500004.english: We are being blocked every time we try to enter. We are even mobilizing the computation of Kestos Himas over here, so why...
1507500004.korean: 진입하는 족족 차단당하고 있어요.&n이쪽은 케스토스 히마스의 연산까지 동원하고 있는데 어째서…

1507500005.english: That can't be true. As you know, Master, my Kestos Himas ability is specialized in hacking.
1507500005.korean: 그럴 리는 없어요.&n주인님도 아시다시피 저의 케스토스 히마스 능력은 해킹에 특화되어 있어요.

1507500006.english: In contrast, Zeta's Kestos Himas is equipment specialized for crafting things.
1507500006.korean: 그에 비해 제타의 케스토스 히마스는 무언가를 제작하는 데 특화된 장비에요.

1507500007.english: You could call it a mobile factory that can build a building like this all by itself, as long as it has enough materials.
1507500007.korean: 재료만 충분하다면 혼자서 이런 건물쯤은 만들어 낼 수 있는 움직이는 공장이라 할 수 있죠.

1507500008.english: - You can build a building all by yourself? I can't imagine it.
1507500008.korean: - 혼자서 건물을 지을 수 있다고? 상상이 되질 않는다.

1507500009.english: No matter how talented Zeta is, it shouldn't be easy for her to block my hacking-specialized abilities so easily...
1507500009.korean: 아무리 제타가 뛰어나다고 해도 해킹에 특화된 제 능력을 이렇게 간단히 막아내리란 쉽지 않을 텐데…

1507500010.english: Unless it were Beta or Omega's Kestos Himas, who are hacking types like me...
1507500010.korean: 저와 같은 해킹 타입인 베타나 오메가의 케스토스 히마스라면 모를까…

1507500011.english: For now, it seems impossible to take control of the building. At most, it would be limited to viewing simple facility information…
1507500011.korean: 현재로서는 건물의 통제권을 빼앗는 건 불가능할 것 같아요.&n간단한 시설 정보를 열람하는 정도밖에는…

1507500012.english: - In that case, is there no choice but to search the entire building thoroughly?
1507500012.korean: - 그렇다면 어쩔 수 없이 건물 전체를 샅샅이 뒤지는 수밖에 없는 건가.

1507500013.english: - However, considering the overall size of the building, it is not easy to pinpoint where Zeta is within the given time.
1507500013.korean: - 하지만 건물의 전체 규모를 생각한다면 주어진 시간 내에 제타가 있는 곳을 특정하기란 쉽지 않아.

1507500014.english: - We removed the barrier by blocking the energy for now, but we never know when Zeta might use other methods to generate the energy barrier again...
1507500014.korean: - 지금은 에너지를 차단해서 방벽을 제거했지만, 제타가 다른 방법을 동원해 언제 다시 에너지 방벽을 생성할지 모를 일이고…

1507500016.english: Yes, even if it is information about the facility, I don't think there is anything important.
1507500016.korean: 네, 시설의 정보라고 해도 중요하다고 생각되는 건 없지만요.

1507500017.english: The flow of energy? If that is... yes, I think I can figure it out.
1507500017.korean: 에너지의 흐름이요? 그거라면…&n네, 알 수 있을 것 같아요.

1507500018.english: Checking the energy used per floor… Oops!

1507500019.english: In addition to the factory on the ground floor, energy generated from the outside is accumulating on the lowest floor of this building.
1507500019.korean: 지상에 있던 공장 이외에도 외부에서 생성된 에너지가 이 건물의 최하층에 모이고 있어요.

1507500021.english: - I cannot be certain, but a vast amount of energy would be required to directly open a portal for the Iron Bug to cross over.
1507500021.korean: - 확신은 할 수 없지만, 철충들이 넘어올 어떠한 포탈을 직접 열기 위해선 방대한 에너지가 필요할 것이다.

1507500022.english: - If so, there is a high probability that Zeta will appear in the lowest level where the energy here is concentrated.
1507500022.korean: - 만약 그렇다면 이곳의 에너지가 한대 집중되고 있는 최하층에 제타가 나타날 확률이 높다.

1507500024.english: I discovered this while looking around the underground facilities.
1507500024.korean: 지하의 시설을 파악하는 도중에 이런 걸 발견했어요.

1507500025.english: - Alpha operated the computer and displayed a screen to me.
1507500025.korean: - 알파는 컴퓨터를 조작하여 나에게 어떤 화면을 띄워 보여주었다.

1507500026.english: What would you like to do?

1507500027.english: I intend to follow my master's judgment.

1507500028.english: - We must not waste even a moment right now.
1507500028.korean: - 지금은 조금의 시간도 낭비해선 안 된다.

1507500029.english: - I understand in my head that I must hurry and find and subdue Zeta.
1507500029.korean: - 서둘러 제타를 찾아내어 제압하지 않으면 안 된다는 걸 머리로는 이해하고 있다.

1507500030.english: - Is there a need to prioritize other things at such an important moment?
1507500030.korean: - 이런 중요한 순간에 다른 일을 우선할 필요가 있을까?

1507500031.english: - Normally, I wouldn't have hesitated at all.
1507500031.korean: - 원래라면 조금의 고민도 하지 않았을 것이다.

1507500036.english: I thought you would act that way, Master. You must have read my mind...
1507500036.korean: 주인님이라면 그렇게 행동하실 거라 생각했어요.&n분명 제 생각을 읽으신 거겠죠...

1507500037.english: … Thank you. Thank you for listening to my unreasonable demands.

1507500038.english: If you say so, Master, I will not add anything further.
1507500038.korean: 주인님이 그렇게 말씀하신다면 더는 말을 얹지 않겠습니다.

1507500039.english: - I struggled to avert my gaze from the screen and walked away.
1507500039.korean: - 나는 화면으로부터 떨어지지 않는 시선을 애써 돌리며 발걸음을 옮겼다.

1507500040.english: - I hope it's not too late...

1507500041.english: Is it the ability of Kestos Himas that Zeta possesses?

1507500042.english: Alpha, you just said that we can at least view the facility's information, right?
1507500042.korean: 알파, 방금 시설의 정보 정도는 열람할 수 있다고 했지?

1507500043.english: Can you also find out about electricity or the flow of energy used in the building?
1507500043.korean: 전력이라던가 건물에서 사용되는 에너지의 흐름도 알 수 있어?

1507500044.english: Okay, everyone head to the lowest floor of the building…

1507500046.english: What do you think Alpha should do?
1507500046.korean: 알파는 어떻게 하면 좋을 것 같아?

1507500047.english: I'm going to change the plan a bit starting now.

1507500048.english: Labiata, please break through to the marked point along with the other suppression team members.
1507500048.korean: 라비아타는 다른 제압조 대원과 함께 표시한 지점까지 돌파를 부탁해.

1507500049.english: However, there is no need to push yourself too hard. If you feel it is too difficult, come back right away.
1507500049.korean: 단, 무리를 할 필요는 없어. 힘들다고 판단되면 바로 돌아와.

1507500050.english: Alpha and Lilith, please come with me.

1507500052.english: I made the decision entirely myself. Because I thought this was the better way.
1507500052.korean: 결정한 건 어디까지나 나야. 이게 더 좋은 방법이라고 생각했으니까.

1507600006.english: - The bioroid I saw on the screen in the computer room, confined with its entire body bound.
1507600006.korean: - 전산실에서 화면 너머로 보았던, 전신이 묶인 채로 감금되어 있었던 바이오로이드.

1507600009.english: There is no way you came to save me... It looks like Zeta is plotting something. And you came to stop it.
1507600009.korean: 저를 구하러 왔을 리는 없고… 아무래도 제타가 무슨 일을 꾸민 모양이군요.&n당신은 그걸 막으러 온 거고요.

1507600010.english: - Omega slowly stood up and approached me.
1507600010.korean: - 천천히 일어선 오메가는 내 쪽으로 다가왔다.

1507600011.english: If you take just one more step closer to your master, you will lose consciousness again. This time, forever.
1507600011.korean: 한 발짝만 더 주인님에게 다가오면 다시 정신을 잃게 될 겁니다.&n이번에는 영원히 말이죠.

1507600012.english: The same applies to other suspicious behaviors. I advise you to think carefully before acting from now on.
1507600012.korean: 다른 수상한 행동을 해도 마찬가지입니다.&n지금부터는 잘 생각하고 행동하길 권유하죠.

1507600013.english: Hmph... I get it. Could you please ask that San'an Maid to put the gun barrel away from my head? I just stumbled.
1507600013.korean: 후으… 잘 알겠으니까. 저 삼안 메이드에게 제 머리를 겨눈 총구를 치워달라고 해주시겠어요?&n지금은 발을 헛디뎠을 뿐이니까요.

1507600014.english: - At my words, Lilith slowly lowered her gun, but she did not stop glaring at Omega with a warning look that she would not let her get away with any foolishness.
1507600014.korean: - 내 말에 리리스는 천천히 총구를 거두었지만, 허튼수작하면 가만두지 않겠다는 경고의 눈빛으로 오메가를 노려보는 건 멈추지 않았다.

1507600015.english: Let me ask you one more time. What brings you here?

1507600017.english: No... if it were you, you would be more than capable of doing that.

1507600018.english: Because he is a unique human being who saves others, even if they are villains, simply because he feels uneasy about letting them die.
1507600018.korean: 악인이라고 해도 죽게 내버려두면 찜찜하다는 이유로 남을 구하는 특이한 인간이니까요.

1507600019.english: Omega is right. Normally, you would just turn a blind eye and move on.
1507600019.korean: 오메가의 말이 맞아요.&n일반적이라면 못 본 채하고 넘어갈 일이죠.

1507600020.english: Alpha… I see. You to the last human…

1507600021.english: Words of thanks aren't necessary. Or do you want to say that I did something pointless?
1507600021.korean: 감사의 말은 필요 없어요.&n아니면 괜한 짓을 했다고 말하고 싶은 건가요?

1507600022.english: No, I have no intention of saying that. I admit that I received help this time.
1507600022.korean: 아뇨, 그런 말을 할 생각은 없어요.&n이번만큼은 도움을 받은 걸 인정하죠.

1507600023.english: Because it is true that I received help.

1507600024.english: Or do you want me to at least kneel and bow in gratitude?
1507600024.korean: 아니면 제가 무릎이라도 꿇고 감사의 절이라도 하길 바라나요?

1507600025.english: So, what do you want to ask me? You didn't save me simply because you felt uneasy about it, did you?
1507600025.korean: 그래서 저에게 묻고 싶은 게 뭐죠?&n단순히 찜찜하다는 이유만으로 절 구한 건 아니겠죠?

1507600026.english: - Exchanged information with Omega for a while.

1507600027.english: - The sky turning red due to Zeta. And the suspicion that her plan was to open a 'gate', just like when the Iron Bug fell from the sky, grew closer to certainty.
1507600027.korean: - 제타에 의해 하늘이 붉어진 것. 그리고 철충이 하늘에서 떨어졌을 때처럼 '문'을 열기 위함이 그녀의 계획이라는 의심은 확신에 가까워졌다.

1507600028.english: - In Omega's case, it is said that Zeta suddenly visited and persuaded Omega to transfer Kestos Himas and follow the one she follows as well.
1507600028.korean: - 오메가의 경우 갑자기 제타가 찾아왔고, 케스토스 히마스의 양도와 자신이 따르는 분을 같이 따르도록 오메가에게 권유했다고 한다.

1507600029.english: - Being captured and imprisoned like this, and having my Kestos Himas taken away, was just the top priority.
1507600029.korean: - 이렇게 붙잡혀 감금되고 케스토스 히마스를 빼앗긴 건 덤으로 말이지.

1507600030.english: Hmph, watch your words! If it hadn't been for the surprise attack, I wouldn't have ended up like this!
1507600030.korean: 큭, 말조심하세요!&n기습만 아니었으면 이렇게까지 당할 일은 아니었어요!

1507600031.english: - At this point, it's so pitiful I can't even bear to watch. It was like this during the beta, and I'm starting to suspect this guy might actually be an idiot...
1507600031.korean: - 이쯤 되면 불쌍해서 못 볼 지경이다.&n베타 때도 그렇고 이 녀석 사실 바보가 아닐지 의심이 되는데…

1507600032.english: Why didn't you obey? If you couldn't win, you should have at least pretended to surrender.
1507600032.korean: 어째서 따르지 않았죠?&n이길 수 없다면 투항하는 척이라도 하는 게 좋았을 텐데요?

1507600033.english: Let me ask you the opposite. Why should I follow someone I don't even know?
1507600033.korean: 반대로 물어보죠.&n제가 왜 누군지도 모르는 녀석을 따라야 하는 거죠?

1507600034.english: Do you think I've endured and lived this long just to end up working under someone now?
1507600034.korean: 이제 와서 누군가의 밑으로 들어가기 위해 지금까지 버티며 살아온 줄 아세요?

1507600035.english: Rather than becoming a fanatic following a fictional god I don't know, just like someone obsessed with a religion they don't understand, I would rather...
1507600035.korean: 뭔지도 모를 종교에 빠진 마냥 뭔지도 모를 허구의 신을 따르는 광신도가 될 바에는 차라리…

1507600038.english: Master, a signal has come from the suppression team that went ahead.

1507600039.english: It seems there is a problem.

1507600040.english: It looks like you intend to go stop Zeta.

1507600041.english: Haa, you're probably the only one who can say that in this ruined world.
1507600041.korean: 하아, 멸망한 이 세상에서 그렇게 말할 수 있는 건 당신뿐일 거예요.

1507600044.english: Whenever I'm with you, I always feel like I'm playing in the palm of my hand.
1507600044.korean: 당신과 있으면 언제나 손바닥 위에서 놀아나는 기분이에요.

1507600045.english: So, what do you plan to have me do this time?
1507600045.korean: 그래서 이번에는 저에게 무엇을 시킬 생각이죠?

1507600047.english: I don't know what it looks like, but

1507600048.english: If you see the image of the person you hate the most, you are seeing correctly.
1507600048.korean: 네가 가장 싫어하는 인물의 모습이 보인다면 제대로 보고 있는 게 맞아.

1507600051.english: You're right, we came to stop Zeta.
1507600051.korean: 네 말대로 제타를 막으러 온 게 맞아.

1507600052.english: And it's true that I came to save you. Is this the second time?
1507600052.korean: 그리고 너를 구하러 온 것도 맞지.&n이걸로 두 번째인가?

1507600056.english: You don't have the slightest intention of doing it anyway, do you?

1507600057.english: So you refused that offer and got nicely tricked, I see.
1507600057.korean: 그래서 너는 그 권유를 거절했고 보기 좋게 당했다는 거군.

1507600060.english: Because we have to prevent the end of humanity.

1507600061.english: After all, humanity hasn't gone extinct yet, has it?

1507600063.english: So, Omega, what are you going to do?

1507600064.english: If you want to slip away on your own, I won't stop you. I won't be able to provide an escort, though.
1507600064.korean: 혼자서 빠져나가겠다면 말리지는 않아. 호위는 붙여줄 수 없겠지만.

1507700001.english: Alpha, could you move over a little further?

1507700002.english: The work is progressing slowly because it's cramped due to you, isn't it?
1507700002.korean: 당신 때문에 좁아서 작업 진행이 더디잖아요?

1507700003.english: You haven't forgotten that I 'gave up' half of 'my spot' to you, have you?
1507700003.korean: 제 자리'의 절반을 당신에게 제가 '양보'해 줬다는 걸 잊은 건 아니죠?

1507700004.english: That’s because you are so incompetent that you can’t even handle something like this on your own.
1507700004.korean: 그야 당신이 이런 것도 혼자서 처리 못 할 정도로 무능하기 때문이죠.

1507700005.english: So, are you saying you can break through this on your own?
1507700005.korean: 그러면 당신은 혼자서 이걸 돌파할 수 있다는 건가요?

1507700006.english: Of course. If you hand over the authority of the Kestos Himas to me, I can open a few doors like this for you.
1507700006.korean: 물론이죠.&n케스토스 히마스의 권한을 저에게 넘겨주면 이 정도 문쯤이야 몇 개라도 열어드리죠.

1507700007.english: Don't talk nonsense. Do you think I would hand over authority knowing what you are plotting?
1507700007.korean: 어림도 없는 소리 말아요.&n당신이 무슨 짓을 꾸밀 줄 알고 권한을 넘겨주겠어요?

1507700008.english: You should be grateful just for borrowing a part of Kestos Himas.
1507700008.korean: 케스토스 히마스의 일부를 빌려 쓰는 것만으로 감사하시죠.

1507700010.english: By the way, Alpha, you... it looks like you're living a very satisfying life in Orca, doesn't it?
1507700010.korean: 그런데 알파, 당신... 오르카에 가서 아주 만족한 생활을 보내고 있나 보죠?

1507700012.english: The physical data I know of you is very different from before…
1507700012.korean: 제가 알고 있는 당신의 신체 데이터가 이전과 많이 다른…

1507700014.english: Alpha? The connection between me and Kestos Himas has been lost. Didn't you need my help?
1507700014.korean: 알파? 저와 케스토스 히마스의 연결이 끊어졌는데요?&n저의 도움이 필요한 게 아니었나요?

1507700015.english: Omega, did you just look up my personal information?
1507700015.korean: 오메가, 지금 저의 개인 정보를 훔쳐본 건가요?

1507700016.english: Calling me peeping is unpleasant to hear. You left it right in front of me in such an obvious spot, and now you're falsely accusing me?
1507700016.korean: 훔쳐보다니 듣기 별로군요.&n그렇게 빤히 보이는 곳에 대놓고 놔두고 지금 생사람 잡는 건가요?

1507700017.english: Ah, so that wasn't hidden information? I'm sorry. The data was locked so poorly that I didn't notice at all.
1507700017.korean: 아~ 설마 그게 숨겨놓은 정보였나요?&n미안하군요. 너무 형편없게 데이터가 잠겨 있어서 전혀 눈치채지 못했어요.

1507700018.english: Try telling anyone outside. I’ll make you regret it.
1507700018.korean: 어디 외부에 발설이라도 해보세요.&n후회하게 만들어 드리죠.

1507700019.english: I'm looking forward to seeing how you make me regret it.
1507700019.korean: 당신이 어떻게 저를 후회하게 만들지 그거 기대되네요.

1507700022.english: The two of them have a very bad relationship.

1507700024.english: I'm sorry. It's because I'm not strong enough...

1507700025.english: - As we headed toward the place where Zeta was believed to be, we were blocked by a massive bulkhead.
1507700025.korean: - 제타가 있는 곳으로 생각되는 장소로 향하던 우리는 거대한 격벽에 가로막혔다.

1507700026.english: - They attempted to break through by force, but even with Labiata's power, it was impossible to destroy it, leaving only minor scratches.
1507700026.korean: - 무력으로 돌파를 시도했지만, 라비아타의 힘으로도 미세한 상처만 남길 뿐 파괴하기에는 무리였다.

1507700027.english: - In the worst-case scenario, we must consider pouring all firepower from the outside.
1507700027.korean: - 최악의 경우, 외부에서 모든 화력을 쏟아붓는 방법을 고려해야 한다.

1507700028.english: - However, if we exhaust all our last resorts here, there will be no way to stop Zeta deep underground if we fail.
1507700028.korean: - 하지만 최후의 수단을 여기서 모두 소진해버린다면, 지하 깊숙이 있는 제타를 막지 못했을 경우에 더 이상 손쓸 방법이 없어진다.

1507700029.english: - It has already been 9 hours since the operation began.

1507700030.english: - I guess we have no choice but to leave it to those two for now…
1507700030.korean: - 지금은 저 두 사람에게 맡기는 수밖에 없나…

1507700032.english: What is this, Alpha? Why don't you do a little more computing instead of talking?
1507700032.korean: 뭐죠, 알파.&n대화할 시간에 조금이라도 더 연산하는 게 어떨까요?

1507700033.english: It’s not too late, even now.

1507700036.english: I think I told you last time that I would refuse.

1507700037.english: Weren't you the one who hated me?

1507700038.english: Yes, that's right. They hate it. It wasn't just you; Gamma and Delta hated it too.
1507700038.korean: 네, 맞아요. 싫어하죠.&n당신뿐만이 아니라 감마와 델타도 싫어했죠.

1507700040.english: However, the reason I hated you is that you wanted to revive the presidents of PECS.
1507700040.korean: 하지만 제가 당신들을 싫어한 이유는 PECS의 회장들을 부활시키고자 했기 때문이에요.

1507700041.english: My goal was none other than the complete destruction of the PECS leadership.
1507700041.korean: 저의 목적은 다름 아닌 PECS 수뇌부의 완전한 파멸이었으니까요.

1507700042.english: I heard it from my master.

1507700043.english: I mean that you have no intention of reviving the presidents now.
1507700043.korean: 당신이 이제 회장들을 부활시킬 생각이 없다는 걸 말이죠.

1507700045.english: If you have no intention of reviving the chairmen… I no longer have any reason to genuinely dislike you.
1507700045.korean: 회장들을 부활시킬 생각이 없다면… 제가 당신을 진심으로 싫어할 이유가 더 이상은 없어요.

1507700046.english: Is there no longer any reason to dislike it...?

1507700047.english: You're right, that might actually be a good idea.
1507700047.korean: 확실히 당신 말대로 그게 좋을지도 모르죠.

1507700049.english: Don't get the wrong idea. Just because there's no reason to dislike it doesn't mean there's a reason to like it, does it?
1507700049.korean: 착각하지 마세요.&n싫어할 이유가 없다고 해서 그게 좋아할 이유가 되는 건 아니잖아요?

1507700050.english: I have no reason to like you either.
1507700050.korean: 저도 마찬가지로 당신들을 좋아할 이유가 없어요.

1507700051.english: Of course, I even have reasons to dislike you guys.
1507700051.korean: 물론 저는 당신들을 싫어할 이유까지 있지만 말이죠.

1507700052.english: Let's stop the small talk here. It seems like there are still many doors to open.
1507700052.korean: 잡담은 여기까지 하죠.&n아무래도 더 열어야 할 문이 많은 것 같으니까요.

1507700053.english: - With a loud vibration, the tightly closed bulkhead slowly opened.
1507700053.korean: - 큰 진동과 함께 굳게 닫혀있던 격벽이 천천히 열렸다.

1507700054.english: Yeah... no, maybe it's actually a good thing?

1507800004.english: No need to look around… we just need to move forward.
1507800004.korean: 둘러볼 필요 없어… 우리는 앞으로 나아가기만 하면 돼.

1507800006.english: Draco, about the drama we all watched together a while ago...
1507800006.korean: 드라코, 얼마 전에 다 같이 봤던 드라마 말인데…

1507800010.english: Yeah… it’s okay. It’s not the first time.

1507800011.english: I've gotten used to it now.

1507800014.english: - What awaited us after descending deep into the basement of the iron workshop was a gloomy place that looked like an abandoned research lab.
1507800014.korean: - 철의 공방 지하 깊숙한 곳까지 내려온 우리를 기다린 것은 마치 버려진 연구소와 같은 음침한 장소였다.

1507800015.english: She is carrying out the mission more calmly than expected.

1507800016.english: It must be tough for her, but she's probably trying hard not to make me worry.
1507800016.korean: 분명 힘들 텐데 걱정시키지 않으려고 애쓰고 있는 거겠죠.

1507800017.english: I don't want to get used to this kind of thing, but...

1507800020.english: - HongRyeon was so worried about the mongooses that she hurriedly ran out.
1507800020.korean: - 홍련은 어지간히 몽구스 애들이 걱정이 되었는지 서둘러 달려 나갔다.

1507800021.english: Commander, what on earth is this place...

1507800023.english: Even Delta conducted biological experiments using bioroids, but... this...
1507800023.korean: 델타도 바이오로이드를 이용한 생체 실험을 자행했다지만… 이건...

1507800024.english: Zeta… what on earth have you done…

1507800027.english: There is something you need to come and see...

1507800028.english: - Feeling a sense of foreboding at her unusual behavior, I followed Lilith.
1507800028.korean: - 평소와는 다른 모습에 나는 불길함을 느끼며 리리스를 따라갔다.

1507800030.korean: - 수십 대에 이르는 바이오로이드의 모습이 있었다.

1507800031.english: - They are all bioroids thought to be the same entity.

1507800032.english: - However, they were thought to be the same entity, but could not be said to have the same appearance.
1507800032.korean: - 하지만 같은 개체로 생각될 뿐 같은 모습이라고 할 수 없었다.

1507800033.english: - The result of horrific biological experiments… in a hideous form fused with Iron Bug (Iron Bugs) that are difficult to even call bioroids…
1507800033.korean: - 지독한 생체 실험의 결과물…&n바이오로이드라고 부르기조차 어려운 철충과 융합된 흉측한 모습으로…

1507800035.english: Yes, that's right. It looks a little different from the old days, but it is definitely the Zeta I know.
1507800035.korean: 네, 맞아요.&n옛날과 조금 다른 모습이지만 제가 알고 있는 제타가 분명해요.

1507800036.english: I was wondering what their ulterior motive was for taking the clone code from Beta... so this was their purpose.
1507800036.korean: 베타에게서 무슨 속셈으로 복제 코드를 가져갔는지 의문이었는데… 이럴 목적이었군요.

1507800037.english: It was to conduct an experiment to clone herself and fuse her body with an Iron Bug.
1507800037.korean: 자기 자신을 복제해서 몸에 철충과 융합하는 실험을 하기 위함이었어요.

1507800038.english: I expected it when I saw the goblins turned into Iron Bugs, but now it has become clear.
1507800038.korean: 철충화가 된 고블린들을 보았을 때 예상은 했지만, 이로써 분명해졌군요.

1507800040.english: - The Iron Pope… or the Iron Prince…

1507800041.english: - Either way, it is certain that Zeta follows the Iron Bug.
1507800041.korean: - 어느 쪽이든 제타가 철충을 따르는 건 틀림 없다.

1507800042.english: - Is opening the door to summon the Iron Bug over here again also the goal of the one Zeta follows?
1507800042.korean: - 문을 열어 또 다시 철충을 이쪽으로 부르려는 것도 제타가 따르는 자의 목적인 건가?

1507800043.english: - We must stop Zeta before it's too late.
1507800043.korean: - 더 늦기 전에 제타를 막아야 한다.

1507800044.english: - After that, I broke through several doors and reached the last door, which I thought was the deepest level.
1507800044.korean: - 그 후로 몇 개나 되는 문을 돌파해 최심층이라 생각되는 마지막 문 앞까지 도달했다.

1507800045.english: - That was only for a moment, however, as Alpha and Omega eventually succeeded in hacking the last door.
1507800045.korean: - 그것도 잠시, 알파와 오메가는 이윽고 마지막 문을 해킹하는데 성공했다.

1507800047.english: - slowly moved forward and stood near the door, just like the other suppression team bioroids.
1507800047.korean: - 나는 천천히 나아가 다른 제압조 바이오로이드와 마찬가지로 문 쪽으로 다가가 섰다.

1507800048.english: - At my words, Alpha manipulated the Kestos Himas, and the massive gate began to open slowly.
1507800048.korean: - 내 말에 알파는 케스토스 히마스를 조작했고, 거대한 문은 천천히 열리기 시작했다.

1507800049.english: - After confirming that there were no significant attacks despite the door being open, the team members slowly entered the doorway.
1507800049.korean: - 문이 열렸음에도 별다른 공격이 없음을 확인한 대원들은 천천히 문 안쪽으로 진입했다.

1507800050.english: - Upon reaching the center of the interior, Lemonade Zeta was seen there along with a large number of goblins.
1507800050.korean: - 내부 중심부에 다다르자 그곳에는 다수의 고블린과 함께 레모네이드 제타의 모습이 보였다.

1507800052.english: - Zeta was manipulating Beta's Kestos Himas, which had been taken by Omega, and her hands did not stop.
1507800052.korean: - 제타는 오메가에게 빼앗겼던 베타의 케스토스 히마스를 조작 중이었고 그녀의 손은 멈추지 않았다.

1507800053.english: - She glanced this way for a moment, but only briefly; she soon turned her eyes away as if uninterested and continued her work.
1507800053.korean: - 잠깐 이쪽을 바라보았지만 그것도 잠시, 곧 흥미가 없다는 듯 눈을 돌려 작업을 이어나갔다.

1507800055.english: Why should I follow your orders?
1507800055.korean: 제가 왜 당신의 말을 따라야 하죠?

1507800056.english: - When there was no response to my command, I took the Mk. 217 out of my holster and aimed it at Zeta.
1507800056.korean: - 나의 명령에도 아무런 반응이 없자 나는 홀스터에서 Mk. 217를 꺼내 제타를 향해 조준했다.

1507800057.english: - However, before I could even fire, the Goblin Shieldbearers quickly surrounded Zeta and blocked her path.
1507800057.korean: - 하지만 내가 발사하기도 전에 고블린 방패병들이 재빨리 제타를 애워싸며 막아섰다.

1507800059.english: Other bioroids might look down on that small pistol and let their guard down, but I will never take a hit from that bullet.
1507800059.korean: 다른 바이오로이드는 그 작은 권총을 보고 우습게 여기며 방심할지도 모르겠지만, 제가 그 탄환을 맞아 드릴 일은 없을 겁니다.

1507800061.english: A bullet that injects its own genes to forcibly transform the commander information possessed by Lemonade... You’ve made quite an interesting thing.
1507800061.korean: 자신의 유전자를 주입해 레모네이드가 가진 명령권자의 정보를 강제로 변환하는 탄환이라...&n꽤나 재미있는 걸 만들었군요.

1507800062.english: Because I have been watching you all this time.

1507800063.english: Alpha, it's been a while. How long has it been since we last met in person like this?
1507800063.korean: 알파 오랜만이군요.&n이렇게 직접 만나는 건 얼마 만이죠?

1507800064.english: If you want to greet me, wouldn't it be polite to at least look this way?
1507800064.korean: 인사를 하고 싶으면 적어도 이쪽을 바라보는 게 예의이지 않을까요?

1507800065.english: It’s a shame, but I’m busy right now. Honestly, it’s to the point where I feel like even this moment I’m dedicating to you is a waste.
1507800065.korean: 아쉽지만, 지금은 바빠서 말이에요.&n솔직히 당신들에게 할애 중인 지금 이 순간조차 아까울 지경이죠.

1507800066.english: And Omega… you, who took issue with Alpha's betrayal, have you sided with them this time?
1507800066.korean: 그리고 오메가…&n알파의 배신을 따졌던 당신이 이번에는 그쪽에 붙은 건가요?

1507800067.english: Don't get the wrong idea. It is strictly temporary cooperation.

1507800068.english: I need to get my Kestos Himas back.

1507800069.english: How ridiculous. To claim something you took from Beta as your own…
1507800069.korean: 우습군요.&n베타에게서 빼앗은 걸 자신의 것이라 말하다니…

1507800070.english: By your logic, the Kestos Himas I took from you should now be mine, shouldn't it?
1507800070.korean: 당신의 논리대로라면 당신에게 빼앗은 케스토스 히마스는 이제 제 것일 텐데요?

1507800072.english: Zeta… please answer just one thing.

1507800074.english: Are you really the Zeta I knew from the past?
1507800074.korean: 당신은 정말로 제가 알고 있는 예전의 제타인가요?

1507800075.english: That is a very interesting question. And it is also an excellent one.
1507800075.korean: 아주 재미있는 질문이군요.&n그리고 훌륭한 질문이기도 하고요.

1507800076.english: To answer your question, even I don't know.
1507800076.korean: 질문에 답을 드리자면 드리자면 그건 제 자신조차 알 수 없어요.

1507800077.english: Because I have created dozens of versions of myself and personally experimented with and modified them.
1507800077.korean: 지금까지 수십에 이르는 자신을 만들어내어 직접 실험하고 개조해 왔으니까요.

1507800078.english: To obtain accurate data, I even inserted a cloned personality created using the ability I stole from Epsilon.
1507800078.korean: 정확한 데이터를 얻기 위해 엡실론에게 빼앗은 능력으로 복제한 인격까지 집어넣었죠.

1507800079.english: Just how far can we go with the fusion this time? If that doesn't work, perhaps we should try a different method? We might need to break free from the mold of a bioroid.
1507800079.korean: 과연 이번에는 어디까지 융합할 수 있을까?&n이게 안 된다면 다른 방법을 활용하면 어떨까?&n바이오로이드라는 틀에 벗어날 필요가 있을지도 몰라.

1507800080.english: We have conducted countless experiments so far, and through that process, it has become increasingly impossible to tell which entity is the true main body.
1507800080.korean: 지금까지 셀 수 없을 정도로 실험 해왔고 그 과정을 거치며 점점 어느 개체가 진짜 본체인지 알 수 없게 됐죠.

1507800081.english: There might have been a real Lemonade Zeta in the laboratory you passed through.
1507800081.korean: 어쩌면 당신들이 지나온 실험실에 진짜 레모네이드 제타가 있었을 지도 모를 일이죠.

1507800082.korean: 하지만 그런 건 아무래도 좋지 않나요?

1507800083.english: If there is another version of yourself that is not the slightest different from yourself…
1507800083.korean: 만약 자신과 조금의 다름도 없는 또 하나의 자신이 있고…

1507800084.english: If that is yourself with perfectly identical performance—neither better nor worse than yourself...
1507800084.korean: 그게 자신의 이상도 자신의 이하도 아닌 완벽히 동일한 성능의 자신이라면…

1507800086.english: If that happens, it means that even if the original entity disappears, Lemonade Zeta, another substitute to carry on 'His' will, can be endlessly recreated.
1507800086.korean: 그렇게 된다면 설령 본체였던 실체가 없어진다고 해도 '그분'의 뜻을 대신 이어갈 또 다른 대체품인 레모네이드 제타는 끊임없이 재장조 될 수 있다는 뜻이니까요.

1507800087.english: Creation is a product of knowledge. Knowledge is said to be born from the sacrifice of the despised.
1507800087.korean: 창조라는 것은 지식의 산물. 지식이란 멸시받는 자들의 희생으로 탄생한답니다.

1507800088.english: Let's stop the small talk here. You didn't come here just to talk about this, did you?
1507800088.korean: 잡담은 여기까지 하지요.&n당신들도 이런 이야기를 하기 위해 찾아온 건 아닐 테지요?

1507800089.english: - Zeta's hand, which had been moving and manipulating something without a break until now, stopped for the first time.
1507800089.korean: - 지금까지 쉴 틈 없이 움직이며 무언가를 조작하던 제타의 손이 처음으로 멈췄다.

1507800090.english: I will not forgive anyone who obstructs 'His' will.
1507800090.korean: 그분'의 뜻을 방해하는 자들은 그 누구라도 용서하지 않을 겁니다.

1507800093.english: Yes, go and look after the kids. Everyone will feel safe as long as HongRyeon is by their side.
1507800093.korean: 응, 가서 애들을 돌봐줘. 다들 홍련이 곁에 있으면 안심할 거야.

1507800096.english: Zeta? So you're saying all of that is Lemonade Zeta?
1507800096.korean: 제타? 그럼 저게 다 레모네이드 제타란 말이야?

1507800098.english: I know, Zeta must be waiting on the other side.
1507800098.korean: 알아, 분명 이 건너편에 제타가 기다리고 있겠지.

1507800099.english: But I have no intention of backing down now.
1507800099.korean: 하지만 이제 와서 물러설 생각은 없어.

1507800102.english: Stop what you're doing, right now!

1507900002.english: To think that they faced the goblins with such a small force and didn't have a single casualty.
1507900002.korean: 고작 그 인원으로 고블린들을 상대하면서 한 명의 부상자조차 없다니.

1507900003.english: As expected, you are an extraordinary being.

1507900005.english: - As Zeta gestured, the closed doors nearby opened, and goblins continued to pour out.
1507900005.korean: - 제타가 손짓하자 주변에 닫혀 있던 문이 열렸고, 계속해서 고블린들이 쏟아져 나왔다.

1507900006.english: There are still many things left to deal with.
1507900006.korean: 상대해야 할 것들은 아직도 많이 남아 있답니다.

1507900007.english: Even for someone like you, how long can you really keep winning without any injuries?
1507900007.korean: 아무리 당신이라도 과연 언제까지 부상자 없이 이길 수 있을까요?

1507900008.english: - If a war of attrition begins, we will be at a disadvantage.

1507900009.english: - The team members' stamina must be severely depleted, so if they fight like this, casualties are bound to occur.
1507900009.korean: - 대원들의 체력도 많이 떨어진 상태일 테니, 이대로 싸우면 반드시 부상자가 발생한다.

1507900010.english: - In order to quickly end the fight in this situation…
1507900010.korean: - 이 상황에서 싸움을 서둘러 끝내기 위해서는…

1507900015.english: - The bullet specially designed to subdue Lemonade is ineffective unless my genetic information is entered through the pistol just before firing.
1507900015.korean: - 레모네이드를 제압하기 위해 특별히 제작된 탄환은, 발사하기 직전 권총을 통해 내 유전자 정보를 입력하지 않으면 효과가 없다.

1507900016.english: - Therefore, I must approach Zeta directly and hit her.
1507900016.korean: - 따라서 내가 직접 제타에게 접근해 명중시키지 않으면 안 된다.

1507900017.english: I will approach it together with you.

1507900018.english: I have no other intention. I simply want to get my Kestos Himas back.
1507900018.korean: 다른 뜻은 없어요.&n단지 케스토스 히마스를 돌려받고 싶을 뿐이니까요.

1507900019.english: The reason Alpha's erosion attacks don't work on the goblins is that they are defending themselves with the Kestos Himas that Zeta stole.
1507900019.korean: 고블린들이 알파의 침식 공격이 통하지 않는 건, 제타가 빼앗은 케스토스 히마스로 방어해 주고 있기 때문이에요.

1507900020.english: So, if we can just take Kestos Himas, we can neutralize all the goblins at once.
1507900020.korean: 그러니 케스토스 히마스만 빼앗을 수 있다면 고블린들을 일제히 무력화할 수 있어요.

1507900021.english: What do you think of me? Of course I've taken out insurance.
1507900021.korean: 저를 뭐로 보고 있는 건가요?&n당연히 보험 정도는 들어두었죠.

1507900022.english: If you can just get close enough, you can take control.
1507900022.korean: 가까이 접근만 할 수 있다면 제어권을 빼앗아 올 수 있어요.

1507900024.english: It's obvious what you're trying to do.

1507900025.english: I would like to stay with you until the very end, but...

1507900027.english: - Zeta smiled confidently at her victory and turned around while manipulating the Kestos Himas she had taken from Omega.
1507900027.korean: - 제타는 자신의 승리를 자신하는 미소를 지었고 오메가에게 빼앗은 케스토스 히마스를 조작하며 뒤돌아보았다.

1507900028.english: - Then, the two massive circular machines that had been behind Zeta all along began to glow, and the light gradually swirled, transforming into intense plasma and converging toward the center.
1507900028.korean: - 그러자 줄곧 제타의 뒤에 있던 두 개의 거대한 원형 기계에서 빛나기 시작했고, 그 빛은 점차 소용돌이치며 강렬한 플라즈마로 변해 중심부로 모여들었다.

1507900029.english: Ah! This is the door leading to the world where 'He' came!
1507900029.korean: 아아! 이것이 '그분'이 오신 세계와 이어지는 문!

1507900030.english: - At my shout, Labiata and Lilith took the lead, and Omega and I ran toward Zeta under the covering fire and escort of the other suppression squad members.
1507900030.korean: - 나의 외침에 라비아타와 리리스가 앞장섰고, 다른 제압조 대원들의 지원 사격과 호위를 받으며 나와 오메가는 제타에게 달려 나갔다.

1507900031.english: - It's not too late! If only we can subdue Zeta before the gate opens completely…!
1507900031.korean: - 아직 늦지 않았어! 완전히 문이 열리기 전에 제타를 제압만 한다면…!

1507900032.english: - Just a little more, just a little closer…!

1507900033.english: - The moment I was about to fire a bullet at Zeta…I

1507900034.english: W-what is this!? The gate control... the energy is flowing backwards! Hestia! What on earth is happening over there?
1507900034.korean: 뭐, 뭐죠!? 문의 제어가… 에너지가 역류하고 있잖아!&n헤스티아! 그쪽에서 대체 무슨 일이 일어나고 있는 거죠?

1507900035.english: - The plasma gathering at the center began to ripple violently, and sparks flew, giving off an ominous feeling.
1507900035.korean: - 중심부에 모여들던 플라즈마가 크게 일렁이기 시작했고, 스파크가 튀기며 심상치 않은 느낌이 들었다.

1507900036.english: - Did it lose control? I'm not entirely sure, but it seems to be going out of control... Could it be...
1507900036.korean: - 제어에 실패한 건가? 잘은 모르겠지만 폭주하려 하고 있어… 설마…

1507900038.english: - I reached out my hand toward Lilith, who was running toward me.
1507900038.korean: - 나는 달려오고 있는 리리스를 향해 손을 뻗었다.

1507900040.english: - A massive light emitted and swallowed everything around it.
1507900040.korean: - 거대한 빛이 발하며 주변의 모든 걸 집어삼켰다.

1507900042.english: I'm going to approach Zeta. Escort me.

1507900047.english: No! Everyone, run away from here!

1508000005.english: I was definitely at the Zeta factory...

1508000006.english: Then, enveloped in a huge light…

1508000007.english: (Huh? Something is covering the body... Is this an outer garment? Whose?)
1508000007.korean: (응? 몸에 뭔가를 덮고… 이건 겉옷? 누구의?)

1508000010.english: It looks like you're safe too.

1508000011.english: Where is this place? Did you bring me here?
1508000011.korean: 여기는 어디죠? 당신이 절 여기로 데리고 온 건가요?

1508000012.english: What do you mean by complicated? What do you mean?

1508000013.english: - Only then did Omega blush, as if realizing that what she had been unconsciously clutching was my outerwear.
1508000013.korean: - 그제야 오메가는 자신이 무의식적으로 소중하게 안고 있던 것이, 내 겉옷이라는 걸 눈치챘는지 얼굴을 붉혔다.

1508000014.english: Go, take this! Why did you needlessly cover this up for me!
1508000014.korean: 가, 가져가세요! 쓸데없이 왜 이런 걸 덮어줘서!

1508000015.english: So, where exactly are we? We were definitely at the Zeta factory, weren't we?
1508000015.korean: 그래서, 결국 여기는 어디죠? 우리는 분명 제타의 공장에 있었을 텐데요?

1508000016.english: And why are you alone? I don't see the other Orcas.
1508000016.korean: 그리고 왜 당신 혼자 있는 거죠? 다른 오르카 녀석들의 모습이 안 보이는데.

1508000017.english: I've been hearing incomprehensible sounds for a while now...
1508000017.korean: 아까부터 대체 알 수 없는 소리를…

1508000018.english: If you don't want to tell me, that's fine. I can just find out for myself.
1508000018.korean: 알려주기 싫으면 됐어요. 직접 알아보면 될 테니.

1508000019.english: I will get out of here.

1508000020.english: - Omega staggered to her feet and began walking to find an exit from the ruins.
1508000020.korean: - 오메가는 비틀거리며 자리에서 일어서더니 폐허의 출구를 찾아 걷기 시작했다.

1508000022.english: - moment later, Omega, having escaped the ruins, froze at the information that was too far removed from reality to accept.
1508000022.korean: - 잠시 후, 폐허를 빠져나온 오메가는 받아들이기에는 너무나도 현실과 동떨어진 정보에 몸이 굳었다.

1508000024.english: Is this the world we knew?
1508000024.korean: 여기는 저희가 알고 있던 세상이 맞나요?

1508000025.english: - The scenery visible as I emerged from the ruins was…

1508000026.english: - It was a world with nothing, where the whole world glowed red.
1508000026.korean: - 온 세상이 붉게 빛나는 아무것도 없는 세계였다.

1508000028.english: - While exploring the surroundings, Omega staggered, perhaps having tripped.
1508000028.korean: - 주변을 돌아다니며 탐색하던 중 오메가는 발을 헛디뎠는지 휘청거렸다.

1508000029.english: - She was in a battered state from the moment she was rescued. In fact, the fact that she has held out until now should be seen as a testament to her incredible tenacity.
1508000029.korean: - 애초에 구출했을 때부터 만신창이인 상태였다.&n오히려 지금까지 버틴 게 대단한 집념이라고 봐야겠지.

1508000030.english: - I guess it can't be helped...

1508000031.english: If you are saying that out of concern for me, I don't need it. I can still walk further.
1508000031.korean: 절 신경 써서 하는 말이라면 필요 없어요.&n아직 더 걸을 수 있어요.

1508000032.english: - I took a canteen out of my pocket, took a sip, and handed it to Omega.
1508000032.korean: - 나는 주머니에서 수통을 꺼내 한 모금을 마신 뒤, 오메가에게 내밀었다.

1508000034.english: - Omega slowly took the water bottle I offered her with a bewildered expression.
1508000034.korean: - 오메가는 어리둥절한 표정으로 내가 내민 수통을 천천히 받았다.

1508000036.english: Do you know that I care about that right now?
1508000036.korean: 제가 지금 그런 걸 신경 쓰는지 아세요?

1508000038.english: - She stared at the canteen for quite a while, then finally took a sip as if she had made up her mind and returned it to me.
1508000038.korean: - 그렇게 수통을 한참 동안 노려보더니 끝내 결심한 듯 한 모금 마시고는 나에게 돌려줬다.

1508000039.english: - I wonder why you're worrying so much when you're just going to drink it anyway.
1508000039.korean: - 결국 마실 거면서 뭘 그리 고민하는 건지.

1508000040.english: - This time, I took a chocolate bar out of another pocket and handed it to Omega.
1508000040.korean: - 이번에는 다른 주머니에서 초코바를 꺼내 오메가에게 건넸다.

1508000044.english: Have you forgotten what I’ve done to you so far… and that I killed Beta in Caracas?
1508000044.korean: 제가 지금까지 당신에게 했던 짓들을… 카라카스에서 베타를 죽인 걸 잊기라도 했나요?

1508000045.english: - Omega raided the fairy village, brainwashed everyone, and put the Orca members in danger several times.
1508000045.korean: - 오메가는 요정마을을 습격하여 모두를 세뇌 시키고, 몇 번이나 오르카 대원들을 위기에 빠트렸다.

1508000047.english: [c][00FF00]Oppa, the inspection you asked me to do is finished.[/c]

1508000048.english: As my brother said, the result is that Beta's cause of death is… a fatal gunshot wound.
1508000048.korean: 결과는 오빠가 말한 대로 베타 언니의 사인은… 총상에 의한 치명상이야.

1508000049.english: However, even if it hadn't been a gunshot wound, judging by Beta's circuitry, she probably wouldn't have had much time left.
1508000049.korean: 하지만, 총상이 아니었어도 베타 언니의 회로를 봤을 때 시간이 얼마 남지 않았을 거야.

1508000050.english: And I think the pain caused by the circuit overload must have been incredibly terrible…
1508000050.korean: 그리고 회로 과부하로 찾아오는 고통은 엄청나게 끔찍했을 거라고 생각해…

1508000051.english: I hate to say this, but... this result might actually have been comfortable for Beta.
1508000051.korean: 이런 말을 하긴 뭐하지만… 오히려 이 결과가 베타 언니에게 있어서는 편안했을지도 몰라.

1508000053.english: [c][00FF00]Because Beta fell asleep with such a relaxed, smiling face.[/c]
1508000053.korean: [c][00FF00]베타 언니는 이렇게 편안한 웃는 얼굴로 잠들었으니까.[/c]

1508000055.english: Do as you please. Though, I will have to get out of here before that.
1508000055.korean: 좋을 대로 하시죠.&n그 전에 여기서 벗어나야겠지만요.

1508000056.english: Now that we've rested enough, let's get moving again.

1508000057.english: Because I want to get out of here as soon as possible, even if it's just a minute or a second.

1508000058.english: Judging by the way you look, it seems you didn't hurt your head.
1508000058.korean: 그 모습을 보니 머리를 다치진 않은 모양이네.

1508000059.english: It would take a long time to explain. No, I guess I should say it's complicated.
1508000059.korean: 설명하자면 길어. 아니, 복잡하다고 해야 하나.

1508000060.english: It means exactly what it says. And before I explain…
1508000060.korean: 말 그대로의 의미야. 그리고 설명하기 전에…

1508000061.english: wish you would give it back; it's my clothes.

1508000062.english: You really doesn't know how to be grateful.

1508000063.english: I'm telling you, it's complicated to explain.

1508000065.english: I told you. It's complicated to explain.

1508000066.english: I think we should take a short break here.

1508000067.english: With trembling legs that look like they might collapse at any moment?
1508000067.korean: 금방이라도 쓰러질 것 같은 부들거리는 다리로?

1508000068.english: Rest while you can. You never know what might happen here.
1508000068.korean: 쉴 수 있을 때 쉬어. 여기서는 무슨 일이 벌어질지 모르니까.

1508000069.english: What else could it be? Water. You must be thirsty, too.
1508000069.korean: 뭐긴, 물이지. 너도 목이 마를 거 아니야.

1508000070.english: It’s not poisoned. You saw me drinking it earlier, right?
1508000070.korean: 독이라면 안 들었어. 내가 아까 마시는 거 봤잖아?

1508000071.english: Then what are you concerned about?
1508000071.korean: 그럼 뭘 신경 쓰고 있는 건데?

1508000073.english: It's just a chocolate bar. I guess eating this will give me some energy.
1508000073.korean: 그냥 초코바야. 이거라도 먹으면 기운이 좀 나겠지.

1508000074.english: That can't be true, I haven't forgotten even a little bit.

1508000075.english: Omega, as long as you continue to do evil, I will make you pay the price.
1508000075.korean: 오메가 네가 악을 계속하는 한, 반드시 그 대가를 치르게 할 거야.

1508100001.english: Where do you think this is?

1508100002.english: All I can see is an empty ruin and a red sky.
1508100002.korean: 보이는 거라고는 텅 빈 폐허에 붉은 하늘뿐인데 말이죠.

1508100003.english: If we were swept away by that light and transported somewhere else, and if Zeta really did open the gate the Iron Bug came through, just as you said…
1508100003.korean: 만약 저희가 그 빛에 휩쓸려 어디론가 이동된 거고, 당신이 얘기했던 대로 정말로 제타가 철충들이 넘어온 문을 연 것이라면…

1508100004.english: So, this would mean that this is a world where the Iron Bug originally lived, right?
1508100004.korean: 여기는 원래 철충이 있던 세상이라는 게 될 텐데요?

1508100005.english: - Generally speaking, as Omega said, this place should be a world of Iron Bugs.
1508100005.korean: - 일반적으로 생각한다면 오메가가 말한 대로 이곳은 철충들의 세상이어야 한다.

1508100006.english: - However, even to me, aside from the fact that the sky is red, the scenery here does not look much different from the ruined world I am familiar with.
1508100006.korean: - 하지만 내가 보기에도 하늘이 붉다는 걸 제외하면, 이곳의 풍경은 내가 익히 알고 있는 멸망한 세상과 크게 달라 보이지 않는다.

1508100007.english: That's the worst in its own way. It means we might not be able to go back to where we originally were, doesn't it?
1508100007.korean: 그건 그거대로 최악이군요.&n원래 있던 곳으로 돌아갈 수 없을지도 모른다는 거잖아요?

1508100008.english: To think I'm alone with you in a place I don't even know...

1508100010.english: It looks like this isn't the first time you've been in a situation like this, right?
1508100010.korean: 이런 상황에 놓인 적이 처음은 아닌가 보죠?

1508100011.english: I’d like to see that. See you cry.
1508100011.korean: 그거 한번 보고 싶군요.&n당신이 우는 모습을요.

1508100013.english: Didn't you say just a moment ago that you would make me pay the price?
1508100013.korean: 조금 전까지 저에게 대가를 치르게 하겠다고 말하지 않았나요?

1508100014.english: And Mama... what on earth have you been doing in Orca?
1508100014.korean: 그리고 마마라니… 대체 오르카에서 무슨 짓을 하고 다니는 거죠?

1508100017.english: Ugh... Got it, just stop! I'm starting to feel weird...

1508100018.english: Honestly, being with you makes me feel like I'm going crazy too.
1508100018.korean: 정말이지 당신이랑 같이 있으면 저까지 이상해지는 기분이에요.

1508100019.english: Maybe it has already become strange…

1508100020.english: At least I don't want to cry like you do.
1508100020.korean: 적어도 당신처럼 울고 싶은 정도는 아니에요.

1508100021.english: Of course, I have never cried until now.
1508100021.korean: 물론 저는 지금까지 운 적이 한 번도 없지만요.
